title: Syracuse women’s lacrosse rides winning streak into Top 3 of latest poll
summary: Syracuse University women's lacrosse team achieves Top 3 NCAA ranking on a 9-game winning streak. This article reports on athletic achievement and does not contain information relevant to City of Syracuse municipal operations or the Chief Innovation Officer's policy agenda.
